publishedAbstract: In some instances, it might be required to assign an object storage device (OSD) to all the solid state drives (SSDs) on a host machine including a partitioned device that has a dedicated partition for the operating system. In such cases, you must reduce the load on this OSD as it shares the same physical device as the local operating system.
publishedTitle: OSD Weight and Pod Affinity configuration in OpenShift Container Storage - Developer Preview
